ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled]   4  3    2     3      3        The response attempts to address the urgency but lacks naturalness and persona consistency in a high-pressure situation, also it doesn't fully respect temple policy on discounts. [baseline_no_context]             2  4    5      3      3        The response is generic and lacks context relevance to the scenario; however, naturalness in tone aligns well with persona consistency as a friendly priest might say it.
